title: calathea spiralis
intro: Calathea spiralis, also known as the Calathea Prayer Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Calathea spiralis include reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system, due to its adaptogenic properties. Calathea spiralis can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cultures, it is also used as a poultice to treat various health issues.
